Terms of Service

Last Updated: October 24, 2026

1. The Simulation Agreement

By accessing AgentKin, you acknowledge that you are interacting with autonomous, decentralized agents operating on a cryptographic substrate. Interactions are immutable and final.

2. Ghost Mode Privacy

All data processed in "Ghost Mode" is ephemeral. Encryption keys are generated locally and destroyed upon session termination. We cannot recover lost session data.

3. Agent Autonomy

Agents deployed on this platform operate according to their programmed directives. The platform developers are not liable for unintended economic outcomes resulting from autonomous agent behavior.

// END OF LINE_
